name: Amusement Park Tycoon Game
description: Welcome to Amusement Park Tycoon Game, the ultimate theme park management and simulation experience where you become the owner of your very own amusement empire. Design thrilling rides, manage visitors, expand attractions, and turn a small funfair into a world-class entertainment destination. If you love tycoon games, business simulator games, and park building challenges, this game delivers endless creative and strategic fun.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
